question:
Running behind a reverse proxy with a subpath

I want to serve Z-Wave JS UI under a subpath like /zwave/ behind nginx. Is there a way to configure this without rebuilding the frontend?

Setting Z-Wave network keys via environment variables

When deploying with Docker, which environment variables do I use to configure the S0 and S2 security keys instead of typing them in the UI?

Writing a custom plugin

How do I create a plugin package for Z-Wave JS UI? What does the constructor receive and how is it loaded?

What is the Zniffer feature for?

I've heard about a Zniffer tool in Z-Wave JS UI. What does it do and what hardware do I need to use it?

Legacy device values never update

My older Z-Wave device doesn't report value changes on its own. Is there a way to have Z-Wave JS UI poll it periodically?

Device shows up as "Unknown" in the UI

I just included a new Z-Wave device and it's listed as an unknown device. What does that mean and how do I fix it?

Understanding the Network Graph healthcheck

What does the Network Graph tab show me about connectivity between my nodes and the controller?

Migrating from Zwave2Mqtt

I'm currently on Zwave2Mqtt and want to switch to Z-Wave JS UI. Can I reuse my existing settings.json and what changes are breaking?

How does the device config database get updated?

Does Z-Wave JS UI automatically update its internal device configuration database, or do I need to rebuild the docker container to get new device configs?

Writing a custom driver function

I'd like to write my own async JS function that runs with access to the zwave client instance. Where do I configure this and what's available in the function context?

Sending a command to multiple nodes at once

How can I turn on several lights simultaneously instead of sending individual commands to each node? Is there a broadcast or multicast option?

Connecting an external script to Z-Wave JS UI in real time

I want to write a script that receives live node value updates from Z-Wave JS UI without polling the REST API. Is there a Socket.IO endpoint I can connect to?

Overriding a device configuration file

I want to tweak the configuration file for my Fibaro device without waiting for an upstream update. Where do I put my custom config file so Z-Wave JS UI picks it up?

MQTT topic naming for events

What does the mqtt_name wildcard in MQTT topics refer to, and where do Z-Wave driver/node/controller events get published?

Which Docker architectures are supported?

I'm running Z-Wave JS UI on a Raspberry Pi. Which CPU architectures does the official docker image support?

How do I generate debug logs for troubleshooting?

A maintainer asked me for logs. Where do I enable the Z-Wave JS and Z-Wave JS UI loggers and which one is actually useful for network issues?

Is there a health check endpoint I can use for monitoring?

I want my container orchestrator to check if the MQTT and Z-Wave clients are connected. Is there an HTTP endpoint for that?

exec format error when starting the docker container

After starting my container I get "exec user process caused: exec format error". What's wrong and how do I fix it?
